internal_issues.description: REGRESSION: W019 silently reverted from human-approved falsified to standard_physics by commit 209fda5. Curmudgeon confidence 0.95. Restore required.
REGRESSION: W020 reverted from human-approved falsified to unfalsifiable. Exact text ISS-952 fixed was reintroduced verbatim.
REGRESSION: PRED-NEW-002 reverted from human-approved standard_physics to unfalsifiable. Notes field argues against own verdict.
REGRESSION: PRED-TOROID-003 reverted from human-approved standard_physics to unfalsifiable. tldr contradicts verdict.
Part 8b 8b.3 L3a missing discriminating sentence (Pass in this band does not distinguish dome from globe). EXP-191 assigned to analyst.

WIN_012: H1: dome reconciliation quote (electromagnetic not gravitational)
H2: Wang et al (2000) timing critique
WIN_058: H2: finding reword (scaling factor not second convention)
WIN_058b: H1: third -> one of at least three (at-least-three hedge parity)

digest_staleness_note: SEC-8b H1 (Part 4.2 collision) was stale — already resolved before review date. All other holes were current.

curmudgeon_queue.schedule_action_needed: restore_to_bau — mode is BAU but schedule_state intervals are still fast (30min); BAU canonical default is 240min. Human should restore schedules.

workflow_regression_alert.summary: Commit 209fda5 (2026-04-18) reintegrated 4 stale analyst assessments (dated 2026-04-11) that had been explicitly overridden by human approval on 2026-04-14 (ISS-951/952/953/954). Four prediction verdicts were silently reverted without new reasoning or verdict_history updates.
workflow_regression_alert.root_cause: Decider integration pass did not cross-check analyst assessment dates against closed verdict-change issues for the same prediction_id.
workflow_regression_alert.systemic_fix: Recommend tinker audit: (a) all predictions where our_verdict != verdict_history[last].to; (b) add decider pre-push gate: reject verdict change if a closed issue within 30 days set a different value for same prediction_id.

recommended_actions.action: HUMAN: Restore 4 prediction verdicts (ISS-1183-1186): W019=falsified, W020=falsified, PRED-NEW-002=standard_physics, PRED-TOROID-003=standard_physics. These are pending-human regressions from commit 209fda5.
Tinker: Audit all predictions where our_verdict != verdict_history[last].to to catch any other silent reversions.
Human: Restore BAU schedules (curmudgeon/analyst to 4h, decider to 2h) if reactive update work is complete.
Analyst: Process EXP-191 (SEC-8b H12 discriminating sentence)

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Pipeline integrity alert: 4 human-approved verdicts silently reverted
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Commit 209fda5 reintegrated stale analyst assessments from 2026-04-11, overwriting human-approved verdicts set 2026-04-14 for W019, W020, PRED-NEW-002, PRED-TOROID-003. Curmudgeon caught it at 0.95 confidence. Pending human restore.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Governance regression affecting 4 scored predictions; also exposes a workflow gap in integration vs human-approval precedence
